title: Black Velvet Ribbon - 38mm Wide x 1 Metre Cut Length - Luxurious Single-Sided Soft Velvet Trim for Gift Wrapping, Wedding, Bows, Crafts, Christmas, Floral Arrangements & Decor
features: Luxurious Velvet Texture: This 38mm (1.5 inch) wide black velvet ribbon features a plush, soft touch finish on one side and a smooth backing, perfect for elegant crafting and decorative use.
Perfect for Gift Wrapping & Bows: Ideal for holiday packages, birthday gifts, Christmas crafts, or hair bows, our black one-sided velvet ribbon adds a rich and stylish touch to any presentation.
Versatile for Wedding & Event Décor: Enhance floral arrangements, bridal bouquets, centrepieces, or table settings with this 38mm wide velvet ribbon – a favourite for weddings and special occasions.
Easy to Cut & Shape: Our velvet ribbon 38mm wide is flexible yet sturdy, making it easy to tie into bows, sew onto garments, or glue onto craft projects.
Available in Multiple Colours & Lengths: Choose from a variety of rich and muted colours to match your theme or project, sold by the metre and 2 metre lengths for your convenience.
description: A 38mm wide (1.5 inch) one-sided velvet ribbon is a luxurious and versatile trimming ideal for a variety of decorative and crafting applications. With its soft, plush texture on one side and a smooth backing on the other, this velvet ribbon adds a rich, elegant touch to everything from gift wrapping and floral arrangements to fashion accessories and home decor. The generous 38mm width offers a bold visual presence, making it especially suitable for statement bows, sashes, and garment embellishments. Its durability and sumptuous appearance make it a favourite choice for both professional designers and DIY enthusiasts seeking a sophisticated finish.
